title: Do we have any info on what Angles are going to be in 30
display_title: Do we have any info on what Angles are going to be in 30
wikitext:
[]: Do we have any info on what Angles are going to be in 3.0? Post by omega2236 » Mon Oct 10, 2011 11:46 pm Are there any leaks yet?

[]: Somewhat. B/ Post by Alaska Slim » Mon Oct 10, 2011 11:57 pm The trailer in space implies Ariel will make a come back. There'a also Kawrou, which leaves only one angel remaining. My guess is that the last one will be original.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Oct 11, 2011 1:25 am @topic title Pope Gregory, pre-pontification wrote: “Non Angli sed angeli”

[]: Post by Fazmotron » Tue Oct 11, 2011 1:29 am Considering the angles in the last film, I'd say more 90º angles. Also, head to this thread for 3.0 angel speculation until we get some actual news.
